mapper.select: SELECT id, document_id, version_number, stored_path, original_file_name, content_type, file_size, checksum, uploaded_by, created_at FROM managed_document_version WHERE document_id = #{documentId} ORDER BY version_number DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT id, document_id, version_number, stored_path, original_file_name, content_type, file_size, checksum, uploaded_by, created_at FROM managed_document_version WHERE document_id = #{documentId} ORDER BY version_number DESC
